nasb.text: And behold, the whole city came out to meet Jesus; and when they saw Him, they implored Him to leave their region.

esv.text: And behold, all the city came out to meet Jesus, and when they saw him, they begged him to leave their region.

cnv.text: 全城的居民都出來要見耶穌，看見了他，就求他離開他們的地區。

ccb.text: 于是，全城的人都出来见耶稣，见到后，便请求祂离开那地方。

csbs.text: 看哪，全城的人都出来看耶稣，见了耶稣以后，就央求他离开他们的地区。
